# Units

@dynatrace-sdk/units

## 1.5.0

### Minor Changes

- Migrated `formatTimeValues`, `extractDisplayValueFromTimeValues`, and `formatTimeframe` functions from the Strato Design System package to the SDK Unit package. These functions handle both absolute dates and relative expressions with full internationalization support. (PPFB-703)

## 1.4.2

### Patch Changes

- Resolved an issue in formatTimeframeToParts util where inverted timeframes resulted in incorrect year values. (APPDEV-15821)

## 1.4.1

### Patch Changes

- Widened react-intl peer dependency range to ^6.6.0 || ^7.0.0

## 1.4.0

### Minor Changes

- Provide output unit when using getFormatter.(APPDEV-15191)
- Set react-intl as peer dependency.

## 1.3.2

### Patch Changes

- Remove redundant dependencies. (APPDEV-15017)

## 1.3.1

### Patch Changes

- Now returns correct ISOString for all positive UTC offset timezones when using 'day' precision.

## 1.3.0

### Minor Changes

- The `formatTimeframeToParts` function has been migrated from the Strato Design System package to the SDK Unit package. APPDEV-11727

## 1.2.0

### Minor Changes

- Make expressions support offsets without a prefix (e.g., 1d@d instead of +1d@d). APPDEV-14636

### Patch Changes

- `parseTime` now returns a date string without Z (2025-08-14) if it has a 'day' precision to prevent faulty ISOStrings in Safari.
- Formatter returns proper value, when no specific locale was provided and the runtime regional locale has changed. APPDEV-14771

## 1.1.8

### Patch Changes

- Fix infinite value formatting. (APPDEV-14168)

## 1.1.7

### Patch Changes

- Extend the react-intl version range to `^6.8.7 || ^7.0.0`. APPDEV-14343

## 1.1.6

### Patch Changes

- 215ba89b6ce: Fix `parseTimeAsTimeValue` to handle timezone information. (APPDEV-14483)

## 1.1.5

### Patch Changes

- 940eaa1414d: Fix locale default value. (APPDEV-14091)

## 1.1.4

### Patch Changes

- `@w` now automatically detects the user's region to determine the correct start day of the week in `parseTimeAsTimeValue`.

## 1.1.3

### Patch Changes

- Improve variables section and rendering of object types. (APPDEV-13428)

## 1.1.2

### Patch Changes

- Fix units abbreviation default. (APPDEV-13300)
- fix: Improve documentation

## 1.1.1

### Patch Changes

- Optimize performance by caching Intl API calls and streamlining locale handling. (APPDEV-12988)

## 1.1.0

### Minor Changes

- The `parseTimeAsTimeValue` function now accepts a `precision` prop to remove parts of the ISOStrings. (APPDEV-10879)

## 1.0.3

### Patch Changes

- Add '1' to the mapGrailUnit(). APPDEV-13008

## 1.0.2

### Patch Changes

- The `parseTimeAsTimeValue` function now only sanitizes rounded timeframe expressions by removing the `now` prefix (e.g. ´now+1d@d´ to ´1d@d´). Relative timeframe values are no longer sanitized. (APPDEV-12365)

## 1.0.1

### Patch Changes

- Fix a bug where the sdk threw a groupSymbols is undefined error when calling formatUnit(). (APPDEV-12046)

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- Release of 1.0 version

### Patch Changes

- Add supported currencies to the types

## 0.19.0

### Minor Changes

- Breaking Change: Update cascading lists and deprecate the liquid group

### Patch Changes

- Add timeframeTranslations. (APPDEV-10828)

## 0.18.11

### Patch Changes

- ´parseTimeAsTimeValue´ and ´parseTime´ sanitize the expression to remove the ´now´ prefix (e.g. ´now+1h´ to ´1h´). (APPDEV-11731)

## 0.18.10

### Patch Changes

- Invalid locales now fall back to en-US (APPDEV-11378)

## 0.18.9

### Patch Changes

- ´parseTimeAsTimeValue´ now returns null when the ISOString is invalid.

## 0.18.8

### Patch Changes

- Add bit_binary and byte_binary that will cascade with the binary prefixes. (APPDEV-10877)

## 0.18.7

### Patch Changes

- Add `mapGrailUnit` function to convert grail units to a format `@dynatrace-sdk/units` is using

## 0.18.6

### Patch Changes

- Bundle @date-fns/tz to make it available on the lambda layer. (APPDEV-11153)

## 0.18.5

### Patch Changes

- Updated `date-fns` to 4.1.0 and replaced `date-fns-tz` with `@date-fns/tz` for better timezone handling.

## 0.18.4

### Patch Changes

- Add abbreviate option to formatCurrency. APPDEV-10805

## 0.18.3

### Patch Changes

- Enable TimeframeExpression additions

  - `roundDownExpression`s (eg. `@d`)
  - additional offsetUnits (eg. `q`)
    per default.

  The flag `__STRATO__DO_NOT_USE__ENABLE_ROUND_DOWN_EXPRESSION` does not have any effect anymore, so please remove the `_RoundDownExpressionProvider` if you were using it.

  (APPDEV-10733)

- Add `formatLong()` function that can format `long` primitive data-types from Grail

## 0.18.2

### Patch Changes

- Add formatCurrency function. APPDEV-10478
- Add support for years in the `offsetExpression` when using the `__STRATO__DO_NOT_USE__ENABLE_ROUND_DOWN_EXPRESSION` feature flag.
- Add support for `@y` `@q` `@w` `@h` `@m` `@s` in `roundDownExpression`s.

## 0.18.1

### Patch Changes

- Fix near zero numbers being formatted as empty string

## 0.18.0

### Minor Changes

- Add support for timezone Z formatting

## 0.17.0

### Minor Changes

- Remove deprecated `_migrateDeprecatedExpression` function.

## 0.16.3

### Patch Changes

- Fix cascading overflow error

## 0.16.2

### Patch Changes

- parseTimeAsTimeValue() supports valid iso 8601 strings without hours, minutes, seconds or milliseconds.

## 0.16.1

### Patch Changes

- Fix dependency issue

## 0.16.0

### Minor Changes

- Remove usage of old dtsdk

## 0.15.0

### Minor Changes

- Add significant digits option to formatter

## 0.14.3

### Patch Changes

- Bundled the date-fns-tz dependency, so it is also available on the lambda layer.

## 0.14.2

### Patch Changes

- The `parseTimeAsTimeValue` function now supports the roundDownExpression for days and months. Eg. -1d@d
- The `parseTime` and `parseTimeAsTimeValue` now consider the user-settings' timezone when entering time in a certain format.

## 0.14.1

### Patch Changes

- Temporary fix for invalid timezones with a pattern of UTC-\*

## 0.14.0

### Minor Changes

- Introduce new parseTime and deprecate old one.

### Patch Changes

- Improve locale detection accuracy.
- Fix inconsistant formatting of large negative numbers.

## 0.13.2

### Patch Changes

- formatDate() now respects user timezone.
- Improve locale detection.
- Fix bug in cascading.
- Introduce Grail-compatible expression parser.
- Add support for converting temperature units.
- Change symbol of millicore to mcore.

## 0.13.1

### Patch Changes

- Improve conversion accuracy.
- Improve documentation.
- Improve cascading precision.
- Fix +/- Infinity abbreviation bug.

## 0.13.0

### Minor Changes

- Fix bug resulting in type error when using a unit union as input type for the format functions.
- BREAKING CHANGE: deprecating litre in favor of liter

## 0.12.0

### Minor Changes

- BREAKING CHANGE: Changing the default settings to interpret bytes and bits in the decimal system.
- Expose useGrouping option to format function

### Patch Changes

- Add support for non-convertible variants.
- Fix bug where Bel and ratio are treated as variants.
- Fix a bug where cascading inside the format function caused problems with rounded values

## 0.11.1

### Patch Changes

- Bundle `date-fns`

## 0.11.0

### Minor Changes

- Add parseTime to the units package.

### Patch Changes

- Make undefined a valid input unit.
- Make number abbreviation respect locale.
- Make core unit cascade.

## 0.10.1

### Patch Changes

- Corrected the documentation of the cascade functionality.

## 0.10.0

### Minor Changes

- - Marks units.percentage.promile and units.time_squared.second_squared as depricated

  - Added new units units.percentage.per_mille and units.time_squared.square_second
  - Correct other spelling mistakes

  BREAKING CHANGE:

  - Renamed ConvertableUnit to ConvertibleUnit
  - Renamed FormatableUnit to FormattableUnit

- Implement `getFormatting` function to retrieve decomposed formatting parts. Use case: Display the symbol somewhere else not just next to the value.

## 0.9.0

### Minor Changes

- Expose the minimumFractionDigits option.
- Add missing units and correct formatting.
- BREAKING CHANGE
  - Pixel does not have SI prefixes, but only px, MP and GP.
- Fix problem with locales that include lvariant in the private-use extension
- Simplify and improve types
- Add support for compound variants

### Patch Changes

- Corrected the conversion factor of ounce.

## 0.8.3

### Patch Changes

- Correct symbols used for a thousand and a billion when abbreviating the numbers.

## 0.8.2

### Patch Changes

- Update documentation

## 0.8.1

### Patch Changes

- Use seaotter links.

## 0.8.0

### Minor Changes

- The precision was removed from the abbreviateNumber() options, and instead, minimumFractionDigits and maximumFractionDigits were added to match the Intl API.

### Patch Changes

- Correcting the import in a docs example.

## 0.7.1

### Patch Changes

- Add ConvertibleUnit, ConvertiblePack, FormattableUnit to documentation.
- Add description, homepage and keywords to package.json

## 0.7.0

### Minor Changes

- Cascade time up to weeks.

## 0.6.0

### Minor Changes

- Some units have been removed from the cascade list. Affected unit groups are length and mass.

### Patch Changes

- Export CUnit and Unit types

## 0.5.2

### Patch Changes

- Fixes the calculation of a month.
- Fixes a bug where negative numbers have been transformed to positive numbers.
- Improve documentation

## 0.5.1

### Patch Changes

- Set missing package license.

## 0.5.0

### Minor Changes

- Adds documentation to the units package.

### Patch Changes

- Add support for negative numbers in abbreviate and cascade.

## 0.4.0

### Minor Changes

- Adds abbreviate and auto cascade feature to the format api.

## 0.3.0

### Minor Changes

- Renamed package from util-formatters to units. Decimals naming has also been changed to fraction digits.

## 0.3.0

### Minor Changes

- Adds convert functionality.
- Give the user the option to override the locale.
- Add cascade feature for all SI units.

### Patch Changes

- Add missing SI factors and remove unneeded units.

## 0.2.0

### Minor Changes

- Allow to overwrite locale for formatDate and use sdkWeb as a default source for locales if available.
- Add abbreviate number functionality

## 0.1.0

### Patch Changes

- Initial release of @dynatrace-sdk/util-formatters.
